name: PhoneBurner Power Dialer API
what_it_does: Cloud-based power dialer and sales engagement platform with REST API — enabling sales teams to dial up to 4x more contacts per hour, drop pre-recorded voicemails in one click, send post-call emails and SMS automatically, track call outcomes, and sync all activity to CRM for complete outbound calling workflow automation.
use_cases: Managing dialing sessions and contact lists via PhoneBurner API
Querying call outcomes and voicemail drop analytics for SDR performance reporting
Integrating call activity data with Salesforce or HubSpot for pipeline logging
Automating post-call follow-up sequences triggered by call dispositions
Pulling contact engagement history for manager coaching and quota analysis
not_for: AI parallel dialing with live-answer detection (use Orum or Nooks for AI dialing)
Inbound call routing and IVR (use Five9 or Talkdesk)
best_when: A sales team needs a reliable, easy-to-use power dialer for outbound calling with voicemail drop, post-call automation, and CRM sync — without the complexity of AI parallel dialers.
avoid_when: You need AI parallel dialing, multi-channel sequences (email/LinkedIn), inbound call routing, or complex conversational analytics.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token with scoped access. Webhook for call events (answered, voicemail, no answer, disposition). Salesforce and HubSpot native integrations. API token option for server integrations. Well-documented OAuth2 flow.

pricing.notes: Santa Monica, CA-based company. Founded 2009. Bootstrapped and profitable. No VC funding — independent. One of the original cloud-based power dialers. Unlimited calling in US/Canada on all plans. Local presence dialing (spoofed local caller ID) available. Strong reputation for reliability and simplicity. Popular with insurance, real estate, and financial services sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for contacts, sessions, call logs, and voicemail drops. OAuth2 auth. Good API documentation. Webhook for call events. Contact management, session creation, and outcome tracking all available. Post-call automation configured in PhoneBurner admin.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact reads fully idempotent. Call log reads idempotent. Session reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range.
known_agent_gotchas: TCPA compliance required — local presence dialing and recorded calls require compliance
OAuth2 required — more auth complexity than API key competitors
Local presence dialing is additional fee per number
Voicemail drop library requires pre-recorded audio upload — not dynamic text-to-speech
Post-call email/SMS automation configured in admin — not API-driven sequencing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. TCPA compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Call recordings require consent compliance by state. Local presence dialing has regulatory implications. Contact phone data is PII — implement retention policies. Bootstrapped company — no third-party investor security pressure.
